_comment: Input to the pipeline template. `metadata` is the list of deployed subgraphs THIS ONE pipeline reads from and unions into the shared Neon tables — one entry per deployment. NOTE: here `network` is the DEPLOY LABEL (the subgraph-name suffix `royco-day-markets-<network>`), NOT necessarily a distinct chain — `staging` is the same-chain (mainnet) mock-market deployment, so it shares every table with `mainnet` and rows never collide (different market addresses). Add an entry when Day launches on another chain (and add config/markets/networks/<network>.json alongside it), OR for another same-chain deployment like staging.
